message:
[fix] Skills copier path resolution - fixed in both bin/init and src/cli locations

- Fixed path resolution in bin/init/skills-copier.js (../../.claude/skills)
- Fixed path resolution in src/cli/simple-commands/init/skills-copier.js (../../../../.claude/skills)
- Added better error handling with location search and debugging
- Tested successfully in Docker - all 21 skills now copy correctly
- Resolves issue where init command was not creating .claude/skills/ directory
